scripts.install:all: npm --prefix backend install; npm --prefix frontend install
scripts.db:setup: npm --prefix backend run prisma:generate; npm --prefix backend run prisma:push; npm --prefix backend run seed
scripts.start: node ./node_modules/concurrently/dist/bin/concurrently.js -n BACKEND,FRONTEND "npm run start:backend" "set PORT=3001&& npm run start:frontend"
